text.tspan: BIG CHANGES
@liuzhen9320 drops 1,795 lines from opengrok, adding 7,090 new ones in one PR
INSTANT DESTRUCTION
@liuzhen9320 pushes 109 file changes in opengrok, rewriting the entire repo
FIRE SALE
@liuzhen9320 commits 7 times on Friday, turning the repo into a coding bonfire
CODE BOMB
@liuzhen9320 opens sync PR, adding 7k lines that will blow future merge conflicts
DEVOPS DRAMA
@liuzhen9320 moves opengrok to a new architecture, but still waiting for the merge
PERSONAL POWER
@liuzhen9320 completes 8 commits, 7 of them on a single day—pure developer sorcery
